name: Hearty Alphabet Beef Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cut-up meat in a crockpot.
2. Add stewed tomatoes, tomato sauce, water, onion soup mix, and frozen mixed vegetables (partially thawed) to the pot.
3. Cover and cook on LOW for 6 to 8 hours.
4. Turn the setting to HIGH.
5. Add the noodles and cover.
6. Cook on HIGH for 30 minutes or until the vegetables are done.
